title: createComputed
description: Runs a function synchronously during the computation phase, before effects. Use when you need to write to other signals as dependencies update.
signature: createComputed<Next, Init = Next>(fn: (v: Init | Next) => Next, value?: Init, options?: EffectOptions): void
warning_prefer_memo: Prefer createMemo for derived values. Use createComputed only when you need to write to other signals synchronously during the computation phase.
